name: PTO Policy Inquiry
description: Employee asking about PTO policy → routes to SAM (HR agent)

payload.text: Hi, I'm a new nurse in the ICU and I'm trying to understand how PTO accrual works. Do I start earning PTO immediately or is there a waiting period? Also, what's the max I can carry over into next year?

name: Password Reset Request
description: Employee locked out of account → routes to IT-Help

payload.text: I'm locked out of my PeopleSoft account after too many failed password attempts. I need access ASAP — I have payroll to process by end of day. Employee ID: E-10482.

name: Claim Denial Appeal
description: Revenue cycle team needs help with a denied insurance claim → routes to Rev-Cycle

payload.text: Claim #CLM-2026-88421 for patient encounter ENC-445120 was denied by UnitedHealthcare with reason code CO-97 (payment adjusted because the benefit for this service is included in the payment for another service). This is a cardiac catheterization bundling issue. Need to generate appeal letter with supporting clinical documentation.

name: After-Hours IT Emergency
description: Critical system outage at 2 AM → routes to IT-Help with priority escalation

payload.text: CRITICAL: Epic Hyperspace connection pool exhausted on PRODAPP-07. Active sessions: 847/850. Response time degraded to 12.4s (threshold: 2s). ED physicians reporting inability to place orders. Automated restart failed.

name: New Hire Onboarding
description: New physician starting → fan-out to SAM (HR setup) + IT-Help (account provisioning)

payload.text: New hire onboarding initiated for Dr. Amara Okafor, Hospitalist, Internal Medicine. Start date: 2026-03-10. Requires Epic access (provider role), PeopleSoft self-service, VPN token, badge access to Building A floors 3-5, and pager assignment.
